cases.prompt: My Laravel app is slow and I'm hitting N+1 queries on the orders list — how do I fix and prevent it?
cases.expect: recommends eager loading with(), preventLazyLoading, and references query-optimization.md

cases.prompt: I have a nested loop matching users to orders that gets exponentially slower — how do I optimize the Big O?
cases.expect: replaces O(n²) loop with keyBy()/groupBy() O(1) lookup or eager-loaded relationships

cases.prompt: How should I cache an expensive featured-products query and invalidate it when products change?
cases.expect: uses Cache::remember with TTL plus model saved/deleted cache invalidation from references/caching.md
